npc_smog_warning_light.speaker: Eco Guide
lines: ⚠️ Hey, I've noticed you've been using fossil-fuel lighting a lot lately...
The skies are getting hazy. Maybe try opening those curtains tomorrow?

npc_celebrate_streak.speaker: Eco Guide
lines: 🎉 Amazing! You've been on a clean streak!
Look — the trees are growing back and the water is clearing up. Keep it going!

npc_urgent_polluted.speaker: Eco Guide
lines: 🚨 This is serious. The world is heavily polluted.
Every choice matters now. Even small changes can start turning things around.

npc_encourage_pristine.speaker: Eco Guide
lines: 🌿 Beautiful day! Your world is looking pristine.
You're living proof that sustainable choices make a real difference!

pristine: 🌳 The air is fresh and the water sparkles. Your world thanks you!
🦋 Butterflies are returning to the garden. Nature is thriving!
🌻 Every clean choice adds beauty to your world. Keep going!
fair: 🌤️ Things are looking okay, but there's room for improvement.
💪 A few more green choices and you'll see real change!
🌱 Small steps lead to big transformations. You've got this!
degraded: 🌫️ The air is getting thick. Your choices are starting to show...
🏭 Smoke is rising. Consider greener alternatives tomorrow.
⚡ Time to rethink some habits. The world needs your help!
polluted: 😷 The smog is heavy today. Something needs to change.
🌑 The sky is grey and the water is murky. But it's not too late!
🆘 Critical pollution levels. Every green choice is a lifeline.
